title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST: no per-user invoice row cap
description: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST has rate limiting but no cap on outstanding subscription_invoices rows per user. At 120/min default rate limit over one hour = 7200 rows per user. purge_expired_invoices only runs every 100 blocks (~125 minutes for Zcash mainnet). Sustained abuse inflates the subscription_invoices table and slows get_invoice_by_address scans for all payment watcher lookups. Add a per-user pending-invoice cap (e.g. 10) checked before diversifier allocation.
